title: Void: Expansion
description: Some new progression, and a dimension.
body:
[Generic youtube overview](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dnXRE5c-Mi0&ab_channel=Broomg)

**Void: Expansion** is a branch of [Saturated](https://modrinth.com/datapack/saturated), making the Void dimension featured in that mod as a solo release, as well as a few other experimental features.

**How to Enter:** On top of the original way to enter the Void, there is now a much less subtle way to get into the Void. **Rifts!**

**Void Rifts** are functinally a small trial that would be passed before you could enter the dimension. After entering the Nether for the first time, returning to the Overworld after a delay should cause a **Starfall event.**

A Comet will plummet to the Overworld, where a Void Rift will spawn and cause some rift events within a few chunks near it.

The Void itself is a flat plane, with heavy use of white and black. Walking around, you could find some strange pillars that reach into the sky with seemingly no meaning or use. After wandering for who knows how long, you stumble upon an entrance to some kind of structure...

Thank you for looking over this mod/datapack, and i hope you have fun!

__________________________________

Disclaimer 1: While Void: Expansion **_is capable of being used as a standalone_**, it should be _compatable with Saturated_

**_Disclaimer 2: Void: Expansion has some features that are kinda glitchy/experimental. be warned!_**
